summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five listed open PRs. No GitHub mutations are allowed by this job. #91988, #91559, and #93222 are useful canonical PR paths for their own issue families but are not merge-ready without complete merge preflight. #78411 is independent low-risk docs churn and should stay open for normal maintainer review. #93149 needs a maintainer product-surface decision before close or merge planning.

actions.reason: Keep #91988 as the canonical open fix path for #91931, but do not recommend merge in this plan because merge preflight is incomplete.
Keep #91559 as the canonical open fix path for #91542, but do not recommend merge without complete merge preflight.
Keep #78411 independent for normal maintainer review; this plan cannot close low-signal docs PRs or recommend merge without merge preflight.
Maintainer judgment is required on whether OpenClaw wants the new cron add dry-run preview surface before any merge or close recommendation.
Keep #93222 as the canonical repaired contributor branch, but do not recommend merge until the failing check/review-thread state is resolved and complete merge preflight is available.

needs_human: #93149 requires maintainer product-direction judgment for adding cron add --dry-run before merge or close planning.
